title: VoxCPM: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Context-Aware Speech Generation and True-to-Life Voice Cloning
abstract: VoxCPM is a tokenizer-free zero-shot TTS system that resolves the stability-expressivity trade-off through hierarchical semantic-acoustic modeling with semi-discrete residual representations. It uses a MiniCPM-initialized Text-Semantic Language Model, an FSQ semi-discrete bottleneck for semantic-prosodic skeletons, a Residual Acoustic Language Model for fine acoustic details, and a local diffusion transformer decoder over causal AudioVAE latents. Trained on 1.8 million hours of bilingual speech, VoxCPM-0.5B reaches strong open-source zero-shot TTS results and supports context-aware speech generation.

citations.title: Seed-TTS: A Family of High-Quality Versatile Speech Generation Models
